patient_001.title: One pattern, four specialists, nobody connected it
patient_001.body: Elena's morning glucose spikes (NutriSim) began within days of her Metoprolol dose increase (RxShield / MedSync) and recur in weeks following her Sunday-night anxiety peaks (Pathos). Layered on top of her rash -> joint-pain -> ANA -> nephritis trajectory (Curie), the shared graph reveals a combined autoimmune + metabolic syndrome that no single specialist could see from their own records.

patient_001.title: Her kidney decline makes a routine drug risky
patient_001.body: The same reduced kidney function driving the lupus-nephritis flag also slows clearance of atorvastatin -- which Clarithromycin is now blocking via CYP3A4. The autoimmune story and the drug-safety story are the same organ failing in two graphs.
